testcase.name: test_09_create_presales_lead
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_presales_sales_transfer.py:171: in test_09_create_presales_lead assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create lead failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create lead failed: {"detail":"Pre-Sales access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_10_verify_lead_in_presales
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_presales_sales_transfer.py:184: in test_10_verify_lead_in_presales assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get leads failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get leads failed: {"detail":"Pre-Sales access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_11_move_lead_to_appointment_booked
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_presales_sales_transfer.py:213: in test_11_move_lead_to_appointment_booked assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stage update failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stage update failed: {"detail":"Lead not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_12_verify_lead_in_sales_new_appointment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_presales_sales_transfer.py:231: in test_12_verify_lead_in_sales_new_appointment assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get sales leads failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get sales leads failed: {"detail":"Sales access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_13_verify_original_lead_marked_transferred
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_crm_presales_sales_transfer.py:255: in test_13_verify_original_lead_marked_transferred assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get lead failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get lead failed: {"detail":"Lead not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
